summary: Iteration 4 - Visual Overhaul Testing: All critical visual features verified working. Login page renders with new theme colors and fonts. Dashboard displays neon gradient liquid fill cards (green-cyan for income, red-orange for expenses, blue-purple for savings). Tab navigation works correctly across all 5 screens. Dark mode toggle works properly via Settings > Theme with true black (#000000) background. Light mode shows pure white (#FFFFFF) background. Financial health score displays correctly with neon colors. Text legibility confirmed in both themes.

design_issues.issue: Deprecation warnings for shadow* style props (should use boxShadow)
useNativeDriver warning - expected in web environment, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Neon color palette correctly defined in theme.ts with green (#39FF14), red (#FF073A), orange (#FF6B00), cyan (#00FFD1), blue (#00B4FF), purple (#B026FF), yellow (#FFE600)
✓ Dark mode background is true black (#000000) as per Colors.dark.background
✓ Light mode background is pure white (#FFFFFF) as per Colors.light.background
✓ Google Fonts (Space Grotesk + Outfit) loading correctly via CSS link in _layout.tsx
✓ Liquid fill cards implemented with animated gradient effects using LinearGradient
✓ Tab navigation active state shows with primary color (neon cyan in dark mode)
✓ Financial health score displays with neon color ring and breakdown
✓ Insight cards use neon gradient fills (green-cyan, yellow-orange, red, blue-purple)
✓ Theme toggle in Settings works correctly between Light/Dark/System modes
✓ Text contrast is legible in both modes (white on black, black on white)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo account (rajesh@visor.demo / Demo@123)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 focused on visual overhaul verification. All neon theme colors rendering correctly. Dark mode with true black background working. Light mode with pure white background working. Liquid fill cards with gradient animations working. Tab navigation with neon cyan active state working. Financial health score with score breakdown working. All 5 tabs (Dashboard, Transactions, Insights, Invest, Settings) loading without errors. Google Fonts (Space Grotesk + Outfit) loading correctly.
